related_requirements.requirement: The system must protect user information through secure authentication (Must pass security audits without critical vulnerabilities).
related_requirements.explanation: Acts as the entry point functioning as a reverse proxy. It handles SSL/TLS certificate resolution using Let's Encrypt and redirects insecure HTTP traffic to secure HTTPS.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be compatible with the most common web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and mobile devices.
related_requirements.explanation: Exposes ports 80 and 443 to the outside world and manages the routing of HTTP and HTTPS requests towards the application, ensuring standard web protocol support.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must have an uptime of 99.9% and be able to recover from failures in less than 1 hour.
related_requirements.explanation: Functions as a load balancer managing the routing of requests, which contributes to system availability and traffic distribution.

related_requirements.requirement: A user can be either a donor or a company.
related_requirements.explanation: The core application service handles business logic and manages user interactions, distinguishing between user roles.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be available in both Spanish and English.
related_requirements.explanation: Built using Next.js framework with React for UI, serving the web interface which supports language switching.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow registering new users to the system.
related_requirements.explanation: Handles user interactions and integrates with external APIs (Auth.js) for registration processes.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be able to authenticate existing users via email.
related_requirements.explanation: Implements authentication logic using libraries such as Auth.js to manage user sessions and login.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow users to log out.
related_requirements.explanation: Manages user interactions and session states, allowing termination of authenticated sessions.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow logged-in or non-logged-in users to view the profiles of various companies as well as their products.
related_requirements.explanation: Serves the web interface and handles business logic for displaying public profiles and product information.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must be able to modify its public profile/page at any time, as well as preview it while editing.
related_requirements.explanation: Manages business logic for profile updates and provides the interface for editing and previewing.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must have access to the system dashboard to use internal functionalities and additional information (statistics, values, etc.).
related_requirements.explanation: Core application service that handles internal functionalities and integrates data for dashboard display.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must be able to register a product and have it visible on its public profile/page.
related_requirements.explanation: Manages product management logic including creation and visibility settings.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must be able to register a route to link it to its products.
related_requirements.explanation: Handles route management logic and links routes to products within the business logic layer.

related_requirements.requirement: A user must be able to return a product registered in a company using its routes.
related_requirements.explanation: Manages the business logic for the return process and route selection.

related_requirements.requirement: Every product must have a default route in which the user returns it on their own and with their own means.
related_requirements.explanation: Enforces business rules regarding default routes during product and return logic processing.

related_requirements.requirement: Every route must have an associated budget (which can be 0) which the user must be able to pay using the system when returning the product.
related_requirements.explanation: Integrates with external APIs (Stripe) to handle payment processing for route budgets.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must have an affiliation/plan system for companies that want certain advantages (includes three plans: free, basic, and premium).
related_requirements.explanation: Implements the logic for plan systems and integrates with payment providers for plan upgrades.

related_requirements.requirement: The user interface must be intuitive and easy to use for non-technical users (Usability tests with at least 10 representative users achieving a minimum satisfaction score of 8/10).
related_requirements.explanation: Built using React for UI, focusing on interactivity and client-side components for user experience.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must protect user information through secure authentication (Must pass security audits without critical vulnerabilities).
related_requirements.explanation: Implements secure authentication mechanisms using Auth.js and manages session security.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be easy to maintain and update with clear and complete documentation (Average implementation time for updates and problem resolution not exceeding 2 hours).
related_requirements.explanation: Utilizes TypeScript for type safety and Server Components for a structured codebase, aiding maintainability.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be compatible with the most common web browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) and mobile devices.
related_requirements.explanation: Web framework (Next.js/React) ensures compatibility across standard browsers and devices.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be scalable to handle an increase in the number of users and data volume (Capacity to increase server resources and maintain performance with a 50% increase in workload).
related_requirements.explanation: Architecture designed with Server Components and API integrations supports scaling workloads.

related_requirements.requirement: Company products/routes/profile can only be editable and accessible by that company.
related_requirements.explanation: Business logic enforces access control and ownership verification for company data.

related_requirements.requirement: Users can register via email (using MagicLink) or directly via Google authentication.
related_requirements.explanation: Integrates with external APIs (Google, Brevo) to facilitate different registration methods.

related_requirements.requirement: Logged-in users can change language between Spanish and English.
related_requirements.explanation: Client Components handle interactivity including language state management for logged-in users.

related_requirements.requirement: Donor users can return any available product in company profiles, selecting the route and making the corresponding payment (which can be 0).
related_requirements.explanation: Manages the full return workflow including route selection and payment initiation.

related_requirements.requirement: Company users have access to the main dashboard with general profile information (profile completion %, certified status, product count, route count, total products received, chains started, waste avoided).
related_requirements.explanation: Fetches and displays statistics and values via Server Components and data fetching.

related_requirements.requirement: Company users can edit their public profile fields: Public profile URL, up to four external web addresses, up to six locations (Office, Branch, Recovery Center), Logo and Corporate Image, Description, Sustainability information, and Publish toggle.
related_requirements.explanation: Provides the interface and logic to update specific profile fields and publish status.

related_requirements.requirement: Company users can manage products: Create, Edit, Delete. Product fields include: Name, Category/Subcategory, Approximate weight (kg), Approximate dimensions (cm), Up to four images (min 1, max 5MB), Description, Repair service indication, Reward indication, Other brands reception indication, Reception method (routes/company/both), Published status.
related_requirements.explanation: Implements CRUD operations for products using Server Actions and Prisma Client.

related_requirements.requirement: Company users can manage routes: Create, Edit, Delete. Route fields include: Name, Reception channel, Market zone (regions), Reception point, Associated products.
related_requirements.explanation: Implements CRUD operations for routes using Server Actions and Prisma Client.

related_requirements.requirement: Company users can change their plan at any time (free, basic, premium) and must make the corresponding payment.
related_requirements.explanation: Handles plan subscription logic and triggers payment processing via Stripe integration.

related_requirements.requirement: The route of a return must be of the same product that is being returned.
related_requirements.explanation: Validates business constraints during the return process logic.

related_requirements.requirement: The attribute 'name' cannot be repeated among Companies.
related_requirements.explanation: Validates uniqueness constraints before writing data to the database.

related_requirements.requirement: The attribute 'name' cannot be repeated among Products of the same Company.
related_requirements.explanation: Validates uniqueness constraints for products within the business logic layer.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must be able to save all images of all products/users of the system.
related_requirements.explanation: Persists metadata related to user data and product information, though physical storage is delegated to S3.

related_requirements.requirement: The system must allow registering new users to the system.
related_requirements.explanation: Persists all user data and authentication sessions in the relational database.

related_requirements.explanation: Stores authentication sessions and user credentials securely.

related_requirements.requirement: A company must have access to the system dashboard to use internal functionalities and additional information (statistics, values, etc.).

related_requirements.requirement: Company products/routes/profile can only be editable and accessible by that company.

related_requirements.requirement: The attribute 'name' cannot be repeated among Companies.
